activities_projects.title: Angle Reasoning Puzzle
activities_projects.objective: Apply the angle sum property of quadrilaterals
steps: Draw a quadrilateral and label the angles A, B, C, and D
Calculate the fourth angle using the 360° rule

activities_projects.title: Parallelogram Proof Activity
activities_projects.objective: Verify that opposite angles of a parallelogram are equal
steps: Compare opposite angles and record results

activities_projects.title: Diagonal Bisector Verification
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands that diagonals bisect each other

activities_projects.title: Rectangle Diagonal Proof
activities_projects.objective: Investigate equality of diagonals in rectangles

activities_projects.title: Square Diagonal Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Study the intersection of diagonals in a square
steps: Measure the angle formed where diagonals intersect
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns that square diagonals intersect at 90°

activities_projects.title: Quadrilateral Deduction Task
activities_projects.objective: Determine the type of quadrilateral from given properties
steps: Write properties such as equal opposite sides or right angles
Match them to the correct quadrilateral

activities_projects.title: Construct a Parallelogram
activities_projects.objective: Construct a parallelogram using given side lengths
steps: Draw one side of given length
Complete the parallelogram using parallel lines

activities_projects.title: Unknown Angle Challenge
activities_projects.objective: Solve missing angles using parallelogram properties
steps: Write a parallelogram with one angle given
Use angle relationships to find other angles

activities_projects.title: Quadrilateral Hierarchy Map
steps: Explain how squares, rectangles, and parallelograms are connected

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Quadrilateral Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyse quadrilateral shapes in real-life structures
steps: Observe objects like doors, tiles, and windows
